assertions.description: INCORRECT: KiCad v3 .kicad_pcb format stores vias as '(via (at x y) (size 0.889) (layers F.Cu B.Cu) (net N))' without an explicit drill field. The analyzer reports all vias with drill=0 (size_distribution key '0.889/0') and omits min_drill_mm and min_annular_ring_mm from DFM metrics as a result. The actual via drill size is unspecified in the source file; the report should note this rather than silently using 0.
